package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for string_concat_in_loop: Repeated string concatenation inside loops (O(n^2) risk).
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario645Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
